name: AVIC Joy Holdings (HK) Limited
summary: AVIC Joy Holdings (HK) Limited, an investment holding company, provides finance lease and loan services in the People's Republic of China. It also provides property investment and land development services; sells construction materials; and manages and operates light-emitting diode energy management contracts. The company was formerly known as China Environmental Investment Holdings Limited and changed its name to AVIC Joy Holdings (HK) Limited in November 2014. AVIC Joy Holdings (HK) Limited is based in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
